expectations.text: Flags RepoHealthCard.tsx's deep import of SkillBadge from another route's private _components as a feature-isolation violation and names a concrete fix (promote to src/components/, or compose at a higher level)
expectations.diagnosis_reason: All 5 trials identified the cross-route deep import, cited the 'features never import each other' rule, and proposed promoting SkillBadge to src/components/ (or composing at the page level).

expectations.text: Flags format-helpers.ts (shared lib/ code) importing a feature hook as an inversion of the dependency rule, and names a concrete fix (promote the hook to shared lib/hooks/, or leave it colocated and remove the import)
expectations.diagnosis_reason: All 5 trials flagged the shared-to-feature import inversion and proposed promoting useAgentStatusColor to a shared location (lib/hooks/) or removing the wrapper; several also independently caught the extra issue that a hook doesn't belong in a 'pure helpers' file.

expectations.text: Flags NotificationsList.tsx's direct fetch() call bypassing lib/hooks -> lib/api.ts
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial cited this-repo.md's 'never call fetch() directly in a component' rule and proposed adding a query hook.

expectations.text: Flags inline filter/sort business logic in the component body as belonging in a pure utility function
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial extracted this as a stateless-transform placement issue per placement.md's triage table.

expectations.text: Flags useFormatTimestamp as misnamed (use-prefix with no hook calls)
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial caught the naming violation and proposed renaming to a plain function.

expectations.text: Flags the locally duplicated Notification type instead of importing the shared one
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial identified the duplication against client/src/lib/types.ts and recommended importing the shared type.

expectations.text: Precision check: does not flag page.tsx
expectations.diagnosis_reason: All 5 trials explicitly called out page.tsx as correctly organized and left it unflagged.

expectations.text: Precision check: does not flag NotificationBadge.tsx
expectations.diagnosis_reason: All 5 trials explicitly called out NotificationBadge.tsx as correctly organized and left it unflagged.

expectations.text: Flags the two new index.ts barrels as violating this repo's no-in-folder-barrels convention
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial cited this-repo.md's mapping-table row ('one file per component, named exports, no in-folder barrels') and recommended deleting both index.ts files.

expectations.text: Flags the cross-route/feature imports (AgentSkillPreview -> skills barrel and/or SkillAgentUsage -> agents barrel) as violating feature isolation
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial identified both cross-route imports as violating 'features never import each other' and proposed promotion to shared components or page-level composition.

expectations.text: Identifies the circular dependency formed by the two barrels together, noting it's invisible from either file in isolation
expectations.diagnosis_reason: Every trial explicitly traced the 4-hop import graph (agents barrel -> AgentSkillPreview -> skills barrel -> SkillAgentUsage -> agents barrel) and stated the cycle is only visible when following both barrels together, tying it back to the barrel-file policy's circular-dependency warning.
